title: lastrea augescens
intro: Lastrea augescens, also known as the Golden Spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The medicinal properties of Lastrea augescens include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The health benefits of consuming Lastrea augescens include improved digestive health, reduced risk of certain diseases, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Lastrea augescens can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support liver and kidney function.
